Base Offset:

Source:

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31] bootspi_clken rw 0x1 -
[30:10] - - - -
[9:4] bootspi_divsor rw 0x14 boot SPI interface clock divisor
[3:1] - - - -
[0] bootspi_clk_sel rw 0x1 1=XTAL 24M, 0=internal 50M
